title: claytonia rupestris
intro: Claytonia rupestris, also known as mountain spring beauty or rocky spring beauty, is a species of flowering plant in the purslane family that is native to western North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Claytonia rupestris include its ability to support healthy digestion, boost energy levels, and act as a natural diuretic. Claytonia rupestris can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
